content:
# Recommendations ‚Äî for plan iter-021

## TOP ‚Äî execute the pre-committed gate (do NOT run another unconstrained prover round on B6-succ)
- **Dispatch `effort-breaker` on `lem:tensorPowAdd_assoc`** (the plan-iter-020 pre-committed gate; route (b)
  delivered helpers + verified distribution but did NOT close ‚Äî `rw [ih]` "did not find pattern" @3207).
  Granularity: **fine ‚Äî one mathematical claim per lemma**, cut along the prover's own 3-seam analysis:
  - **(i)** a reindex sub-lemma unfolding `tensorPowAdd (k+1+m') m''` via `Nat.succ_add`, dragging the
    `eqToIso` reindexer through the goal type (model on the existing `tensorObjIso_tensorPowAdd_reindex`
    subst helper);
  - **(ii)** a `whisker_exchange` + associator-naturality reassociation sub-lemma that turns the goal's
    DOUBLE whisker `(tensorPowAdd k m' ‚ñ∑ L) ‚ñ∑ L^m''` into `ih`'s SINGLE-whisker LHS so `rw [ih]` fires;
  - **(iii)** the residual canonical braided-pentagon coherence on `L^k,L,L^m',L^m''`, closed by
    `hexagon_forward` + `pentagon` + `whisker_exchange` (NO `Œ≤=id`).
  Proof structure to hand the breaker: blueprint `lem:tensorPowAdd_assoc` proof (L1379‚Äì1410) + the prover's
  task_result blocker analysis. **The 4 route-(b) helpers (L2028‚Äì2053) are the reusable tools the sub-lemmas
  build on ‚Äî keep them.**
- **HARD: NO further unconstrained prover rounds on B6-succ, NO route (a) (re-expose synonym head ‚Äî dead
  end), no fabricated `M`-pin on this lemma, no `maxHeartbeats 1e6`.** Honors `snap-conv-20` = STUCK.

## Blocked / do NOT re-assign
- **B7 `sectionsMul_mul_assoc`** ‚Äî gated solely on B6-succ. Auto-eligible once B6 closes; leg = `simp only
  [gMul_mul_apply]` + B5 (closed) + Œº-naturality slide + B6.
- **3 comm (`tensorBraiding_self_eq_id_of_isInvertible`, `tensorPowAdd_comm`, `sectionsMul_mul_comm`)** ‚Äî
  `[IsInvertible L]` FUTURE, no consumer; `sectionsMul_mul_comm` FALSE for general L. Before any build,
  confirm the pinned Mathlib name `Module.Invertible.tensorProductComm_eq_refl` (chapter-flagged Unknown
  constant) + add `import Mathlib.RingTheory.PicardGroup`.
- **4 œá in `QuotScheme.lean`** ‚Äî DEFERRED to the cohomology leg (œá-semantic, needs higher cohomology).

## URGENT tooling escalation (USER) ‚Äî sync_leanok now CORRUPTS, not just over-strips
- 7th consecutive iter `sync_leanok` mangles `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`. **New severity this iter:** on
  the 12 proof blocks carrying `\uses{}`, it destroyed the `\leanok\uses{` prefix ‚Üí malformed
  `\begin{proof}    <labels>}` (dangling labels, no `\uses{` opening), which the blueprint-doctor reports as
  **build-breaking** (plastex `RecursionError`; "leanblueprint web will crash until resolved"). Review
  repaired all 24 this iter, but the deterministic sync will re-corrupt next run. **Durable fix is sync-side
  and now urgent** ‚Äî the strip regex must (a) not eat the `\uses{` opening, and (b) preferably skip
  re-stripping decls that are already `lean_verify`-axiom-clean on this large/slow file. Surfaced in
  `TO_USER.md`.

## MEDIUM ‚Äî stale comments (review cannot edit `.lean`; planner/next prover to fix)
- `SectionGradedRing.lean` @3225‚Äì3226: stale parenthetical calls B4 (`tensorObjAssoc_eta_factor`) "the
  single remaining sorry of that chain" ‚Äî B4 closed iter-017. (lean-auditor minor.)
- `SectionGradedRing.lean` @3305‚Äì3307: stale `sectionsMul_mul_comm` docstring criticizes a blueprint
  framing ("Mac Lane discharges the hexagon") that no longer exists in the comm lemma (it now correctly
  lives only in the *assoc* lemma). Trim when comm is built. (lvbc minor.)

## Reusable patterns discovered (added to PROJECT_STATUS Knowledge Base)
- **Route (b):** whisker-iso functoriality via the proven `_eq` bridges (`rw [..._eq √ón]; apply Iso.ext;
  simp`) ‚Äî diamond-free; route (a) re-exposing the synonym head is a dead end.
- **`tensorPow_succ`-first source-alignment** before plain `rw [tensorObjWhiskerRightIso_trans]` (iota
  mismatch otherwise; `erw` over-unfolds `tensorObjAssoc` ‚Üí timeout).

## Subagent dispatch (next plan phase)
- blueprint-reviewer: skippable again IF no chapter edit beyond markers and the active B6 cone unchanged
  (gate12 still clean; B6 sketch lvbc-confirmed ADEQUATE). The 24-block repair is marker/`\uses` integrity,
  not prose.
- strategy-critic: STRATEGY.md unchanged (route (b) was a tactic, not a route swap); skippable if SHA-equal
  and prior verdict SOUND.
- progress-critic: **do dispatch** ‚Äî B6-succ remains open; confirm the effort-breaker decomposition is the
  right corrective and the route hasn't re-entered churn.
